feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to configure Quality Inspection Before Ship Notice process between S4 HANA and Ariba?
entry.content:
Dear Exports,

  • As you know there are two models for Quality Inspection in Ariba quality inspection collaboration. The first one is Quality Inspection Before Ship Notice where Buyer creates the Inspection Lot manually after the Purchase Order is created but before the Supplier sends the Ship Notice. The second model for Quality Inspection is Quality Inspection after Ship Notice where the Inspection Lot is created automatically after the Supplier sends the Ship Notice and the Goods Receipt is generated by the Buyer.

If we want to implement Quality Inspection Before Ship Notice process. could you pls. guide us what kind of configurations do we need to do except below configuration points?   why I ask this question, because I'm think about that if we don't need to maintain inspection plan and inspection specifications in S4？ as you known, the inspection lot is created by manually.  thus, I need you to guide me which configurations are mandatory to implement this process. Any comments and suggestions will be appreciated, many thanks in advances.

1.  Maintain the transactions rules as true:

  • Transaction Rule 1: Allow suppliers to send ship notices only after receiving acceptance of inspection.
  • Transaction Rule 2: Require suppliers to provide a quality certificate to ship notices.

2. Maintaining Event linkages for quality inspection requests.

3. Maintaining event linkage for quality inspection decision requests. 

SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Ariba Network Integration for SAP Business Suite

entry.title: SAP HANA Vector Engine for HANA Platform
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

are there any current plans to make the SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/vectorize-your-data-sap-hana-cloud-s-vector-engine-for-unified-data/ba-p/13579558) available in the SAP HANA, platform edition version?

At the moment I can only find information about SAP HANA Cloud.

Many thanks in advance.

Kind rgeards

Florian

entry.title: How to add FI Document Number in Italy eDocument Cockpit app
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is it possible in Italy eDocument Cockpit app to view the FI Document Number in the eDocument source key column and not the billing document? 

Please can you help us?

Thanks and Kind Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.content:
Dear All,

Is it possible in Italy's eDocument Cockpit app to view the FI Document Number in the eDocument Source key column and not the billing document?

Thanks and Kind Regards.

entry.title: Multiple alerts for HDB version upgrade, etc. from SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP
entry.content:
We are receiving recurring multiple alert emails for HDB version upgrade and HDB patch upgrade, HDB end of maintenance like every 4 hours. We catch all alert notifications to notify for all events. Accordingly we receiving it. We do not want to hit the multiple recurring mails in our mail box. How to stop receiving these emails?

Thanks

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ECC 6.0 trans data to HANA Cloud (if data has Currencies, internal and external codes conversion...)
entry.content:
I would like to inquire about the methods and potential challenges I might encounter when transferring data from an on-premise ERP (ECC 6.0) to SAP HANA Cloud. Here are the approaches I currently know of and the associated issues:

  1. Direct data transfer using SLT, but how would currency or date conversion be handled?
  2. Using Integration Suite, there might be limitations in transferring excessively large datasets.
  3. If migrating from ECC 6.0 to S/4, can existing RFCs or APIs be directly integrated?

I'm unsure if there are solutions to these issues or if there are better methods for integrating ECC with S/4. Your assistance in addressing these queries would be greatly appreciated.

SAP Landscape Transformation SAP HANA Cloud  SAP ERP Central Component

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Unable to create HANA Cloud instance
entry.content: Hi all, I am unable to create HANA Cloud instance. It keep prompting maximum of instance create but I have not create any HANA Cloud instance under this subaccount. I did created a HANA Cloud instance under another deleted subaccount before this, is it the cause? if it is, what can I do to get rid of this error?

entry.content:

Please let me know, how can we map calibration order in Public cloud, Because there is no any PM -QM integration found , without Quality inspection lots & MIC Now...

How can we done the Calibration Order ??????.

entry.title: eDocument Chile - list of value mappings
entry.content:
What is the value mapping associated with the unit of measurement in Chile?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Análise Combinatória de dados de bancos diferentes
entry.content:
Eu combinei dados de diferentes origens, um vindo do banco Hana e outro do banco Postgres. A visão do Postgres inclui os campos de código do cliente, nome do cliente, período e valor (que representa a análise do cliente), enquanto a do Hana traz o faturamento da empresa, fornecendo informações sobre as notas. Como se trata de notas, essa view retorna mais linhas do que a do Postgres. Ao combinar esses dados pelo código do cliente, os valores foram duplicados, mas não é claro algumas vezes. Uma abordagem que tentei foi adicionar uma coluna com o valor 1 para contar quantas vezes a mesma informação se repete e depois dividir os valores para obter os dados corretos. No entanto, mesmo ao considerar 1 essa coluna de contagem, ao finalizar a modelagem percebendo que ela contém outros valores além de 1, o que impede que o cálculo retorne os valores corretos. Alguém poderia me ajudar a solucionar esse problema?

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Is it possible to change the names of multiple business partners at once?
entry.content:
Is it possible to change the names of multiple business partners at once?
I tried with Manage Mass Maintenance  -Business Partners app, but the names were not changed.
Please help

entry.title: HANA DB usage of JSON embedded functions
entry.content:
Hello all, 

 

I see that there are other questions here about HANA, pretty old but still decided to ask. 

 

I am trying to query some data and have a NCLOB column with a JSON inside. I can get a specific field using JSON_VALUE function.

Why I cannot use JSON_VALUE in a WHERE clause, doesn't it work exactly the same as a normal filtering, gets some column, check if matches a value, just a little bit more complicated etc. parsing and getting a specific field from a column with JSON inside.

entry.content:
How to include 'EAN' field in Italy XML file?

entry.title: Configuration of protocols
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to know which protocols are activated and how they are configured in my new HANA Cloud.

I found the configuration of some protocols (e.g. for SAL, erro logs and tables in IMG) but not for others. Does anyone know where to find the configuration (not the protocol itself) of the following protocols?

  • Change Documents

  • Change Logs 
  • System Logs
  • User Change Log
  • User-Change logs
  • Transaction logs
  • Change and Transport System (CTS) Logs

  • Application Log

Thank you

entry.title: What to start from to gain knowledge in FPSL?
entry.content: Could you please outline the structure of existing learning materials and planned sessions(if any) on FPSL topic in the context of IFRS17

entry.title: Access virtual tables (HANA Smart Data Access) in my CAP project
entry.content:
Greetings, community experts.

I have the following scenario, which is completely new to me (due to the combination of technologies it has):

I am working on a CAP application on SAP BTP, with the HANA Cloud database and SAP Fiori Elements (technologies that I am familiar with).

However, some of the data tables that my CAP application must use come from an external system, a SAP ECC system, connected to BTP via Cloud Connector, and using HANA Smart Data Access (SDA) to create virtual tables in HANA (duplicates of tables in SAP ECC).

This second one is a new scenario for me. In particular, what I need to know (and be able to do) is how to put those virtual tables inside my CAP application so I can use them to create views and define services?

For example, how do I put or introduce those virtual tables within the HDI Container and Schema of my application?
Is it necessary to do some kind of cross-container access configuration, using synonyms and others, as explained in this post (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-share-tables-across-different-cap-projects/bc-p/13676559#M166997)?

I understand that I should use CDS annotations like @CDS.persistence.exists which prevent the creation of the corresponding objects in HANA, beyond that I know little.

Thank you in advance for any help and/or comments that may shed light on how to approach this scenario.

entry.title: How to create the cds entity Vector column in CAP?
entry.content:
Hi,

Am trying to create entity view contains a embedding vector columns.

our HANA CLOUD instance has been upgraded to QRC01/2024 version, also able to create vector column table within db instance with REAL_VECTOR  data type without any issue

but when i try to create my cds entity

 

 

 

entity Books { 
  title         : String(111);
  embedding     : Vector(3072); 
}

 

 

 

 

i am not able to compile the entity with following error
 
[ERROR] db/rxxxai.cds:34:19-25: No artifact has been found with name “Vector” (in entity:“Books”/element:“embedding”)
 
I've tried to upgrade my following node modules, but doesn't help
 

"@sap/cds": "^7.8.2",
"sap-hdbext-promisfied": "^2.202404.2"
"hdb": "^0.19.8"

Can anyone give some hints?

entry.title: Block invoice for payment when price is below lower limit - in Cloud Public edition
entry.content:
Hi,

When price is too high on a supplier invoice (beyond tolerance) the invoice is posted with a Payment block. But when the price is too low, no block is set, only warning is given. This is standard behavior, but I wonder if there is a way in Public Edition to get a Payment block even for price too low, not only for price too high.
